heading: Welcome back, {{name}}
sub: Review your recent sessions, track your pass rate, and jump into your next practice.

deleteDialog.title: Delete session?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This session history entry will be permanently deleted.

deleteToast.deleteFailed: We couldn't delete this session right now.
deleteToast.sessionNotFound: This session could not be found.
deleteToast.notParticipant: You can't delete a session you didn't participate in.
deleteToast.unauthorized: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

empty.loadingDescription: We're pulling your recent interview history from the sessions endpoint.
empty.unavailableDescription: Session history will appear once your account session is ready.
empty.errorDescription: Session history could not be retrieved right now. Try again in a moment.
empty.noMatchDescription: Try adjusting your search, filter, or sort settings to surface more session history.
empty.noSessionsDescription: Your completed interview practices will appear here once you start training.
